calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Continued To Apr-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class And Representative Action Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANDREA COOKS' Unopposed Motion for Leave to File First Amended Class and Representative Action Complaint.

The unopposed motion is granted for good cause shown. Plaintiff has leave to file the proposed First Amended Class and Representative Action Complaint attached as Exhibit 2 to the Mukherjee Declaration.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
